storytelling.narrative_arc_summary: A sustained kitchen rally culminates in an aggressive speed-up that goes out, concluding the point.

predicted_badges.reasoning: The clip features a prolonged sequence of dinks and soft volleys at the kitchen line.
The majority of the rally takes place within the non-volley zone, showcasing kitchen play.
Player 1 attempts a powerful speed-up shot to end the rally.

badge_trigger_moments: The sequence of volleys at the kitchen line triggers Dink Machine and Kitchen King.
The final aggressive shot triggers Speed Demon.

commentary.neutral_announcer_espn: A well-contested rally at the kitchen line, with both teams demonstrating solid dinking skills. The point concludes with an aggressive speed-up that unfortunately sails just long.
commentary.hype_announcer_charged: OH! What a battle at the net! Back and forth, back and forth, until a lightning-fast speed-up! Just inches out, but that was a statement shot!
commentary.coaching_breakdown: Good job maintaining kitchen position and patience during the dink exchange. However, the final speed-up needs better control and placement. Consider aiming for the opponent's feet or a wider angle to increase the chances of staying in bounds and forcing an error.
commentary.social_media_caption: Kitchen battle heats up! 🔥 Who do you think won this point?
commentary.ron_burgundy_voice: Great Scott, that was a rally of epic proportions! The ball danced like a gazelle on a hot tin roof, only to be met with a thunderous, albeit slightly wayward, strike. Truly a magnificent display of human endeavor, if I do say so myself.
commentary.chuck_norris_voice: Chuck Norris once played pickleball with a single dink. This rally, however, required mere mortals to unleash a flurry of volleys, ending with a shot so powerful, it defied the very boundaries of the court.
commentary.color_commentator_banter: You know, that's the kind of rally that really tests your patience. You see players just waiting for that one opportunity, and sometimes, you just go for it, even if it's a little too much.
commentary.trash_talk_friendly: Almost had it! Next time, aim for the lines, not the parking lot!
commentary.announcement_text_for_tts: A well-contested rally at the kitchen line, with both teams demonstrating solid dinking skills. The point concludes with an aggressive speed-up that unfortunately sails just long.

daas_signals.clip_summary_one_sentence: A competitive kitchen rally ends with a powerful speed-up shot going out of bounds.
